LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF WELLINGTON CHEN'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HIS AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE OF BREACH OF THE WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY THROUGH HIS DECLARATION STATING THAT DEFECTS IN THE WINDOW SECURITY SYSTEM, OF WHICH PLAINTIFF HAD NOTICE, HAVE NOT BEEN REPAIRED. THE COURT ORDERED MR. CHAN TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
